block_01: Measure the trend strength with the ADX
block_02: If you are trying to find the optimal time to enter or exit a trade, this indicator might be precisely what you need. By applying the ADX (Average Directional Index) tool, you can measure the strength of a trend and even identify upcoming trend reversals. This information may help you decide on the best moment to open or close your trades.
block_03: Get step-by-step instructions on the set-up and a great ADX +Parabolic SAR indicator combo in this material.
